"A sky that catches fire
above still waters…"

Our Story

A Hidden Paradise
in the Atlantic Coast

Nestled between the ancient lagoon of Merja Zerga and the whispering Atlantic winds, La Maison des Oiseaux is not simply a place to sleep — it is a place to breathe again. A sanctuary where Moroccan soul meets the rhythm of migratory wings, where every sunrise paints the sky in terracotta and gold.

"Every guest who arrives as a traveller
leaves as something more — a witness
to the quiet miracle of this place."

Hosted by Majd, a Superhôte with nine years of devoted hospitality, every corner of this estate has been touched with intention — from the carved Andalusian arches to the Moroccan lanterns swaying in the garden breeze, from the tiled infinity pool reflecting the dusk sky to the handwoven rugs warming each private suite.

🍋
Garden Breakfast — Included Daily
The Kitchen

Flavours Born
from the Atlantic

Mornings begin with the scent of msemen and argan oil drifting through the garden. Each breakfast is included — a ritual of fresh-squeezed orange juice, honey from local beehives, and warm Moroccan bread under the open sky.

By evening, the tables are set with candles and ceramic platters of seasonal seafood, Atlantic fish chermoula, and slow-cooked lamb tajine perfumed with cumin and saffron.

Meals
Breakfast ✓
Style
Moroccan Traditional
Setting
Garden & Terrace
The Living World

Merja Zerga —
Where Earth Breathes

One of Morocco's great natural sanctuaries, the Merja Zerga lagoon hosts over 200 species of migratory birds each season. Just beyond our garden gate, an entire universe of wings, water, and wonder awaits.

🦩
Flamingo Colony
Watch pink clouds of flamingos settle on the shallow lagoon waters as the sun descends — a spectacle that transcends photography.
⛵
Traditional Boat Journeys
Board a traditional wooden boat with local fishermen and drift into the heart of the lagoon, where only birds and silence exist.
🌅
Golden Hour Rituals
Every evening, the Atlantic sky performs. From our rooftop or the lagoon banks, no two sunsets are ever the same.
🌊
Atlantic Proximity
The ocean is minutes away — wild, salt-washed, and healing. Let the waves reset whatever the world has added too much of.
🌿
Eco-Tourism Values
We believe in hospitality that gives back — supporting local artisans, fishermen, and the conservation of Merja Zerga's biodiversity.
🦅
Bird Sanctuary
Over 200 species including ospreys, purple herons, and rare Audouin's gulls make this lagoon a mecca for ornithologists worldwide.

La Maison des Oiseaux
Moulay Bousselham · Morocco
Nestled beside the Merja Zerga lagoon, between Kenitra and Larache on Morocco's stunning Atlantic coast. 90 minutes from Casablanca, 2 hours from Rabat.
